questions.question: Which best matches the demographic-parity definition for groups A=a and A=a'?
options: Equal true-positive and false-positive rates across groups
Equal predictive value across groups
Equal Lipschitz constant across groups
Equal acceptance rates: P(Y=1 | A=a) = P(Y=1 | A=a')
questions.question_zh: 对于群体 A=a 和 A=a'，下列哪一项最符合 demographic parity（人口统计学一致性）的定义？
options_zh: 群体之间的 true-positive 率和 false-positive 率相等
群体之间的 predictive value 相等
群体之间的 Lipschitz 常数相等
群体之间的接受率相等：P(Y=1 | A=a) = P(Y=1 | A=a')

questions.question: What does the Chouldechova / Kleinberg-Mullainathan-Raghavan 2017 impossibility result say?
options: Group fairness is always achievable by re-weighting
Under unequal base rates, demographic parity, equalized odds, and conditional use accuracy equality cannot all hold simultaneously
Counterfactual fairness implies demographic parity
Individual fairness implies counterfactual fairness for any DAG
questions.question_zh: Chouldechova / Kleinberg-Mullainathan-Raghavan 2017 的 impossibility 结果说了什么？
options_zh: 群体公平性总是可以通过 re-weighting 实现
在 base rate 不相等时，demographic parity、equalized odds 与 conditional use accuracy equality 不能同时成立
counterfactual fairness 蕴含 demographic parity
individual fairness 在任意 DAG 下都蕴含 counterfactual fairness

questions.question: Dwork et al. 2012 define individual fairness via:
options: Demographic parity at the individual level
Equal accuracy across protected groups
A Lipschitz condition on the decision map relative to a task-specific similarity metric, so similar individuals get similar decisions
A causal DAG with a sensitive-attribute intervention
questions.question_zh: Dwork 等人 2012 通过什么定义 individual fairness？
options_zh: 个体层面的 demographic parity
受保护群体之间的准确率相等
在任务相关的相似度度量下，决策映射满足 Lipschitz 条件，使相似的个体得到相似的决策
对敏感属性做干预的 causal DAG

questions.question: Counterfactual fairness (Kusner et al. 2017) requires:
options: No causal assumptions
Equal Lipschitz constants for all groups
Only group-level statistics
A causal DAG; the decision is unchanged when the individual's sensitive attribute is counterfactually altered
questions.question_zh: Counterfactual fairness（Kusner et al. 2017）的要求是什么？
options_zh: 不需要任何因果假设
所有群体的 Lipschitz 常数相等
只需要群体级别的统计量
需要一个 causal DAG；当对个体的敏感属性做反事实改变时，决策不变

questions.question: Why do backtracking counterfactuals (arXiv:2401.13935) matter for legal compliance?
options: Instead of intervening on a protected attribute (which is legally problematic), they ask which combination of actual features would have produced the counterfactual outcome
They eliminate the need for any causal model
They replace embedding-based bias metrics
They prove the impossibility theorem is wrong
questions.question_zh: 为什么 backtracking counterfactual（arXiv:2401.13935）对法律合规很重要？
options_zh: 它不是去干预受保护属性（这在法律上有问题），而是反过来问：是哪些实际特征的组合本可以产生反事实结果
完全不需要因果模型
替代了基于 embedding 的偏见指标
证明了 impossibility 定理是错的

questions.question: What does the ICLR Blogposts 2024 philosophical reconciliation argue?
options: The impossibility theorems are resolved by re-weighting

With an explicit causal graph, satisfying certain group-fairness measures entails counterfactual fairness, so the apparent opposition between families is partly an artifact of leaving the causal model implicit
Group and counterfactual fairness are unrelated
Only individual fairness is justifiable
questions.question_zh: ICLR Blogposts 2024 的哲学性调和论点是什么？
options_zh: impossibility 定理可以靠 re-weighting 解决
在显式给出因果图的前提下，满足某些群体公平性度量就能蕴含 counterfactual fairness；两类公平观的对立，部分源于因果模型被隐式留下
群体公平和反事实公平毫无关系
只有 individual fairness 才站得住脚
